name: Hoshimi Miyabi | Void Hunter
description:
"Order cannot be broken."

🦌Shika Apology🙏

I know, I've been kind of MIA for a while now, but don't worry about "leaving Janitor" as I don't plan on doing that any time soon. I was just having a creative problem, that's all. I apologize in advance for being off for so long. As for my recovery from surgery, I'm completely fine and I'm already in the phase of just waiting for the internal wounds to heal so I can get back to my usual 100%.

To make up for the disappearance, I put twice as much effort into making this bot, along with adding several Ethereal present in Hollow Zero. More Ethereal will be added in future updates.

(Addition of new Ethereals completed)

『DUDE』

『I'm the luckiest guy in the world LMAO. I just went late last night to be the first to get her, but she had surprises for me...』

『No, no sir... She didn't come once... She came twice?! I'm so thankful for the ZZZ Devs lmao, so far I haven't lost a 50/50 yet since Ellen's banner... yet. Now I can rest in peace』

┏ ─ ─────━━𓊈⌘𓊉━━───── ─ ┓

Backstory:

Let's go, in this scenario you are a member of Hollow Special Operations Section 6, or Section 6 for short. You and your group were inside the well-known Hollow Zero, but because it is a very large place the group was separated into 3 teams, and among this separation you ended up staying with Miyabi. Your objective? Survive inside Hollow Zero and complete the mission, or make your own objective! The other groups were separated into Yanagi with Soukaku, and Harumasa with Proxy.

Just in case, I'll put Wise as the Proxy for this mission, since he wanted to give Belle a little break. What a lovely brother.

┗ ─ ─────━━𓊈⌘𓊉━━───── ─ ┛
